summary: Iter 227 frontend regression PASSED. Verified: (1) /client-capture CONTACT + SERVICE OVERVIEW pills are now navy rgb(26,39,68)=#1a2744 with gold icon rgb(212,168,76)=#D4A84C; no 3B9CDC bright blue leak. Save/Reset/Pull Xplan/Push Xplan buttons render. (2) /client-portal (app_mode=client) Goals tab renders [data-testid=simple-goals] with goals-next-step, 3 goal cards (retirement/home-renovation/legacy-estate) + 3 goal-cta-* CTAs, ON TRACK / REVIEW / HOLDING YOU BACK markers present; no loud orange/emerald/amber classes; navy + gold palette confirmed. (3) Retirement Planner accordion: only section-about-you open by default (h=261); other 6 sections collapsed to ~104px pills (about-partner, income, super, other, spending, advanced). All have *-toggle testids. (4) Accordion behaviour: clicking section-super-toggle expands super (h=483, 5 inputs) AND collapses about-you (h=104, 0 inputs) — single-section-open pattern confirmed. (5) annualised-table hidden initially; clicking toggle-annualised reveals table with 34 rows; second click collapses it. (6) planner-kpi-strip + result-income visible at top (default $180k); clicking section-spending-toggle reveals input-spending → setting to 40000 updates result-income to $40k. (7) results-panel renders. (8) Regressions intact: /client-home airy navy with HELLO DAVID, $9.61M net worth, no errors; /retirement-planner direct route renders sections + kpi; /advisor-command-center mount→unmount produces 0 AbortError; /api/health returns 200.
critical_code_review_comments: RetirementPlannerMoneySmart.jsx already large; consider extracting Section accordion + each question step into separate files for maintainability — not blocking but file growth risk.

Tab triggers (Radix UI) require force=True or proper data-testid click via Playwright; raw document.querySelector().click() did not toggle the tab in this run — noted for future testing-agent reference, not a product bug.
test_credentials: LocalStorage flags only: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent'; for adviser tests app_mode='adviser' + selected_client thompson_family JSON; for client tests app_mode='client', selected_client removed.
seed_data_creation: None — read-only verification against existing CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 227 complete with zero issues. Retirement Planner accordion uses single-section-open pattern (openSection state). Section testids: section-about-you (open default), section-about-partner, section-income, section-super, section-other, section-spending, section-advanced. Each has matching *-toggle button. annualised-table is hidden behind separate showAnnualised state with toggle-annualised button (independent of section accordion). For Retirement tab on /dashboard you must FIRST set adviser mode + thompson selected_client, then navigate, then click [data-testid=client-tab-retirement] with force=True, then wait ~4-5s for lazy-load. On /client-portal in client mode, click [data-testid=client-tab-goals] to reach SimpleGoals.
